description.text: The kitchen is dark and quiet at this hour. The banked coals of the cooking fire glow faintly; a covered pot of stew waits for morning.
You walk into the kitchen, smelling the rich aroma of roasting meats. You find the servant cooking a stew over an open flame.

skills.text: Sneak a taste of the stew
resultText: You dip a finger in while the servant tends the fire. Needs thyme. You say nothing, because officially you were never here.
Another taste. The servant's shoulders stiffen. They know the stew level is dropping, they just can't prove anything.
The servant hands you a spoon without turning around. "If you're going to keep auditing my stew, at least use this."
